title: ngrok Tunnel Session
description: A Tunnel Session represents a running ngrok agent connection to the ngrok service.

id.description: Unique identifier for the tunnel session.

uri.description: URI of the tunnel session API resource.

agent_version.description: The version of the ngrok agent.

credential.description: Reference to the credential used to authenticate the session.

ip.description: The IP address of the agent.

os.description: The operating system of the agent host.

region.description: The ngrok region the session is connected to.

transport.description: The transport protocol used for the session.
